metadata.description: Viral dream-tweet formats + slang from X/Twitter, Reddit, TikTok 2020-2025. Surfaces patterns the AI interpreter should recognize when users frame dreams in these registers.

formats.name: X-coded dream
formats.pattern: this dream felt very [X]-coded
formats.interpretation_hint: User invokes an aesthetic to compress emotional tone. Map to internet_aesthetics.json entries — they're naming the visual mood, not the content.

formats.name: Ate that dream
formats.pattern: I ate that dream / dream ate / served / served lewks
formats.interpretation_hint: Dream content was satisfying / impressive / aesthetically delivered. Compliment to one's own subconscious.

formats.name: Core memory unlocked
formats.pattern: core memory unlocked / unlocked a memory I didn't know I had
formats.interpretation_hint: Dream surfaced a pre-verbal or long-buried recollection. Often nostalgic. Worth tagging for cross-temporal correlation engine.

formats.name: POV dream description
formats.pattern: POV: you have the dream where [scenario] / the dream where you're [doing X]
examples: POV: you have the dream where you're back in high school but you're 35
the dream where you find a new room in your house
formats.interpretation_hint: Universal-dream framing — user invokes a category they assume others share. Surface 'you're not alone' matches via dream matching.

formats.name: And somehow this was normal
formats.pattern: I had a dream that [absurd thing] and somehow this was perfectly normal
formats.interpretation_hint: Recognition that dream-logic accepted absurdity. Self-aware about dream phenomenology.

formats.name: Rate my dream
formats.pattern: rate this dream out of 10 / rate the dream economy / dream tier list
formats.interpretation_hint: Gamified sharing — feeds well into Plaza reactions + challenge format.

formats.name: Main character dream
formats.pattern: I had a main character dream / very main character of me
formats.interpretation_hint: Dream where dreamer is heroic/protagonist of an epic narrative. Often empowering — surface to the user as ego-affirming.

formats.name: Ick dream
formats.pattern: had a dream where [partner/crush] did [minor thing] and now I have the ick
formats.interpretation_hint: Dream-as-evaluation-of-relationship — minor detail in dream triggers waking-life aversion. Worth gentle interpretation, not literal.

formats.name: Delulu dream
formats.pattern: had a delulu dream about [crush] / fully delusional dream
formats.interpretation_hint: Self-aware acknowledgement of wish-fulfillment. Don't analyze too seriously — meet the playful register.

formats.name: Brainrot dream
formats.pattern: absolute brainrot dream / my brainrot is showing
examples: dream where I was an NPC in my own life
formats.interpretation_hint: Dream content reflects oversaturation with internet content. Possibly tag for digital-wellbeing reflection.

formats.name: Haunted by a dream
formats.pattern: still haunted by the dream where / the dream where X happens lives rent free
formats.interpretation_hint: Recurring or persistently-impactful dream. Worth checking against recurring_patterns + IRT push.

formats.name: Weirdest dream
formats.pattern: had the weirdest dream last night / the WILDEST dream
formats.interpretation_hint: Standard sharing opener — user wants engagement. Surface to plaza.

formats.name: Dream lost the plot
formats.pattern: the dream really lost the plot at the end / midway it went off rails
formats.interpretation_hint: User noticing dream-narrative inconsistency. Comment on how this is normal — dreams pivot when REM phase changes.

formats.name: Fever dream label
formats.pattern: this whole [event] felt like a fever dream / fever dream of an experience
formats.interpretation_hint: User invokes fever-dream as descriptor for waking events too. Map to fever_dream_aesthetic for visualization.

formats.name: Shifting / DR dream
formats.pattern: I shifted last night / went to my DR / my CR is so boring after my DR
formats.interpretation_hint: Reality-shifting community: Desired Reality / Current Reality. Treat with respect — don't dismiss as fantasy. Powerful coping mechanism for many young users.

formats.name: Manifesting dream
formats.pattern: had a manifestation dream / the universe sent me a sign
formats.interpretation_hint: Spiritual-but-not-religious framing — common in Gen Z. Mirror the user's framing, don't impose secular reading.

formats.name: I went lucid
formats.pattern: went lucid mid-dream / I caught the dream / did a reality check
formats.interpretation_hint: Lucid-dreaming community — they're proud + want technique discussion. Surface lucid-techniques content.

formats.name: Unhinged dream
formats.pattern: absolutely unhinged dream / my brain is not okay
formats.interpretation_hint: Affectionate self-deprecation about bizarre dream content.

formats.name: Dreamt about ex
formats.pattern: dreamt about my ex AGAIN / why is my brain doing this
formats.interpretation_hint: Common — neutral processing, not a sign user wants reconnection. Provide reassurance.

formats.name: Teeth falling out
formats.pattern: had THAT dream again — teeth falling out / why does my brain do this
formats.interpretation_hint: Universal dream — Hall/Van de Castle norms confirm 39% of population has it. Reassure as common.

formats.name: Lived a whole life in 5 minutes
formats.pattern: fell asleep for 10 minutes and lived an entire life
formats.interpretation_hint: Time-compression dream — REM time-perception works strangely. Worth surfacing the Schwartz 2020 research.

formats.name: Two of you in the dream
formats.pattern: I was both me and watching me / two versions of me
formats.interpretation_hint: Dissociative-feeling dream. Often reflects internal conflict / decision-state. Jungian Shadow integration territory.

formats.name: Celebrity is your friend in dream
formats.pattern: had a dream [celebrity] and I were besties / [celebrity] saved me
formats.interpretation_hint: Parasocial-relationship surfaced in dreams. Common, harmless. Surface a 'you're not alone' match.

formats.name: Visitation dream
formats.pattern: [deceased loved one] visited me last night / felt them there
formats.interpretation_hint: Real phenomenology described in Krippner 2019 cross-cultural surveys. Treat with reverence regardless of user's spiritual frame. Surface gently — don't psychologize away.

formats.name: Specific phobia dream
formats.pattern: every nightmare is just my worst fear in a Halloween costume
formats.interpretation_hint: User's own meta-observation about dream content. Mirror back — they're already doing the analysis.

vocabulary.hits different: dream feels emotionally distinct from waking memory
vocabulary.lore drop: dream that explains something about your past
vocabulary.NPC dream: dream where you're observing not acting
vocabulary.the algorithm: noticing your dreams reflect what you've been consuming online
vocabulary.dream economy: the social market of who shares which dreams
